query: spike response model retinal ganglion cells

results.title: A Spike Response Model for Retinal Ganglion Cell Encoding
results.abstract: We present a four-parameter spike response model that captures linear-rise exponential-decay dynamics in parasol and midget ganglion cells under naturalistic stimuli.

relevanceJudgement.relevanceSummary: Directly proposes an SRM for RGC encoding.

snippets.text: The SRM fits VP spike distance loss.

citationContexts.text: Our threshold dynamics build on the SRM of Brunel et al.

results.title: Victor-Purpura Spike Distance for Model Fitting
results.abstract: A cost-based spike-train metric used to fit and evaluate neural encoding models, including spike response models.

narrative: Two highly relevant results on spike response models and the VP distance metric.
